response.objective_caption: The sun shines brightly just above a distant forested horizon line, illuminating a wide expanse of flat terrain below. The sky above transitions from deep blue to pale yellow and white near the sun.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The sun shines brightly just above a distant forested horizon line, illuminating a wide expanse of flat terrain below. A large translucent pinkish circular ring and a diagonal light streak wash across the entire frame, creating an analog light-leak effect. The lower portion of the image is bathed in an unusual warm red cast, while the sky transitions from deep blue to pale yellow near the sun.
